## Summary
<!-- What does this PR do and why? -->

## Closes
<!-- Reference the governing GitHub Issue: 'Closes #N' -->
<!-- If no issue exists for mechanical changes, explain why: -->
Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] New feature (closes a GitHub Issue)
- [ ] Architecture change (closes a GitHub Issue, references an ADR)
- [ ] Standards change (closes a GitHub Issue, follows SCR process)
- [ ] Mechanical (lint, deps, registry update — no issue required)

## Checklist

- [ ] GitHub Issue exists and is referenced above (or mechanical exemption documented)
- [ ] Issue is assigned to current milestone
- [ ] Tests pass — `pytest tests/unit/`
- [ ] Lint clean — `ruff check .`
- [ ] Compliance scan updated if new files added — `python scripts/compliance_scan.py --scope full`
- [ ] PR description includes SCAN number if compliance scan was run
- [ ] ADR referenced if architectural decisions were made
- [ ] Board updated — issue moved to In Review

<!-- Anything the Engineering Lead should pay particular attention to -->
